title: Sandbox for admins
excerpt:

posts.author: HAMondayAdmin (Andrea)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to have a workspace that is fully functional but does not take actions such as notifying people, etc. for building new workflows.
I know I can turn off notifications, etc, but it would be nice to have a “sandbox” site to build in, without having to remember to turn notifications on/off, etc.
This sandbox version would also allow the adding of people, teams, etc, without them being notified.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Andrea,

I understand where you’re coming from and happy to take this feedback to the relevant team. On that note, are you happy for me to convert this into a feature request so that other community members can vote on this request?
